meaning: adj.对等的,(因偿清债务或报复而)两相抵消的
examples: They raised $630,000 through listener donations, and then called it quits.
However they did it, the Lapita spread themselves a third of the way across the Pacific, then called it quits for reasons known only to them.
You owe me four pounds, but I have your watch, so we'll cry quits.
When one member of the committee quits or dies, the remaining four appoint his replacement.
The longtime power couple of comics, Superman and Lois Lane, are calling it quits.
